name: AUTO-COI-COMPLIANCE-ENGINE — Daily 07:00 COI Status Refresh
_hci_notes: AO-HS-001 + AO-HS-002. Runs daily 07:00. Fetches all HubSpot companies with coi_expiration_date. Calculates days until expiry. Updates coi_status: Active / Expired / Missing. Sends renewal alerts for companies expiring within 30 days (urgent if <=7 days). Requires HUBSPOT_API_KEY env var.
